summary.summary: Extracts a shared BolusSafetyValidator service and applies it to APNS remote-bolus handling and Shortcut-driven boluses (pr:gordolio/Trio#1108, pr:nightscout/Trio#1108, commit:364a4059b005ec75fa6f00584d77a87fc0a17507, diff:b6dcc7dad157). The validator centralises three safety checks: max bolus, max IOB, and a recent-bolus 20% threshold (pr:gordolio/Trio#1108, commit:364a4059b005ec75fa6f00584d77a87fc0a17507, file:4effb19f1649). For APNS remote commands the existing behaviour is preserved by passing the APNS payload timestamp as the lookback start so the recent-bolus check covers the interval between command send and now (pr:gordolio/Trio#1108, commit:364a4059b005ec75fa6f00584d77a87fc0a17507, diff:b6dcc7dad157, file:83b2df2fcf0e). Shortcut-initiated boluses now use the same validator; because Shortcuts lack a caller-provided origin timestamp they use a 6-minute rolling recent-bolus window (pr:gordolio/Trio#1108, commit:364a4059b005ec75fa6f00584d77a87fc0a17507, file:af8569731a26, file:0b3c1b5666d6). The change adds localized rejection strings for Shortcut messages and renames a Shortcut limit enum case (commit:92e8900ea0518217c30ae341873e6b357cb65e80, commit:e1a2af1e34e6f142a27234dbe2a84d24212d36db, file:bb9031638fa2, file:4eae6f9e947d). Unit tests for the validator were added (file:c5b81c6c38fa, diff:b6dcc7dad157).
summary.userFacingImpact: Shortcuts: boluses initiated via Shortcuts previously only checked the pump max-bolus limit and now run the full set of safety checks (max bolus, max IOB, recent-bolus 20% threshold); this means some Shortcut boluses that previously would have been accepted may now be blocked with a localized rejection message (pr:gordolio/Trio#1108, file:af8569731a26, file:bb9031638fa2, file:4eae6f9e947d). APNS remote-bolus behaviour is intended to be unchanged: the validator is invoked with the APNS payload timestamp so the recent-bolus window covers the time between send and execution and existing rejection messages are preserved (pr:gordolio/Trio#1108, commit:364a4059b005ec75fa6f00584d77a87fc0a17507, file:83b2df2fcf0e). A minor side-effect documented in the change is that an unavailable IOB now results in a rejection (with a logged/returned message) rather than throwing an error (pr:gordolio/Trio#1108, commit:364a4059b005ec75fa6f00584d77a87fc0a17507, diff:b6dcc7dad157). New localized strings for Shortcut rejections were added (commit:92e8900ea0518217c30ae341873e6b357cb65e80, file:bb9031638fa2).
